prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SPACEGUNBLACKRED-2PK Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): Kid Fun Existing Title: Intergalactic Space Laser Gun with LED Lights and Futuristic Sound (2-Pack) Description: Attention all space explores don't leave the planet with out your Intergalactic Superhero Laser Space Guns.

These space guns are the ultimate space exploring LED Laser Blasters. Featuring more than 32 different kinds of light changing interactions. You will be prepared for any aliens you come across while exploring unknown territories in space.

Combination of vibrations, sounds, and light changes allow your child's imagination to go wild allowing them to create their own space fantasy and will surely bring hours of lasting entertainment. Between the beautiful display of lights and sounds these space guns would make a perfect addition to any child or adult Halloween costume. Search Terms: gun toys for boys prop gaurdians of the galaxy alien costume Features: - Combination of vibrations, sounds, and lights allow for imagination development - Toy laser guns allow for more than 32 different kinds of light changes - 2 Pack - Perfect addition to any child or adult Halloween costume - Ideal for the active imaginations of both Boys and Girls - Size: 8" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kid Fun 2-Pack 8" LED Laser Space Gun Blasters

openai.item_name: Kid Fun 2-pk 8in Black Red Space Laser Guns

anthropic.title_differentiation: 32 Light Changes, Vibration And Sound Effects, Halloween Costume, Boys And Girls

openai.title_differentiation: 32 Plus Light Modes, LED Sounds And Vibrations, Halloween Costume Prop, Imaginative Space Play For Boys And Girls
